meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and build professional-grade AI applications.
content.answer_block: Without version control, your codebase is a ticking time bomb of lost progress. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you establish an immutable audit trail and automated rollback system. Combine this with Claude Code’s iterative CLI workflow to secure your development cycle, ensuring every experimental feature is tracked, reproducible, and production-ready.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen of broken dependencies and ghost files, realizing your 'final_final_v2' folder isn't a strategy—it's a graveyard for your hard work. Every developer remembers the sinking feeling of deleting a working function and having no way to revert. It’s the baptism by fire that separates hobbyists from engineers.

But the era of chaotic, manual file management ends now. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you aren't just saving code; you are architecting a professional development environment. We are bridging the gap between student projects and enterprise-grade workflows using the precision of Claude Code.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure that enforces strict state management and isolated environment configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold with standard Git-flow integration, including .gitignore, environment variable templates, and a modular folder structure.

steps.title: Configure Atomic Commits
steps.description: Ensure every change is granular enough to be reverted without impacting the entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a pre-commit hook that validates code style and ensures commit messages follow the Conventional Commits specification.

steps.title: Automate Versioning with Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your changes and generate meaningful commit messages that reflect technical intent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current diff and draft a concise, descriptive commit message explaining the logic behind these specific changes.

steps.title: Implement Branching Strategy
steps.description: Isolate new feature development from the stable main branch to prevent catastrophic regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branch management workflow that enforces pull requests for every feature merge into the main branch.

steps.title: Audit and Sync Remote State
steps.description: Verify your local history against the remote repository to ensure zero data loss during collaborative or multi-device builds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a comprehensive audit of the local repository status and push all commits to the remote origin with a summary report.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file; never commit your actual secrets to your repository, no matter how 'safe' you think it is.
Treat your commit messages as technical documentation for your future self; include the 'why' behind the change, not just the 'what'.
Use 'git stash' before switching branches to preserve WIP code without needing to commit half-baked features.
Configure your editor to display Git status in the gutter so you always have immediate visual feedback on file state.
Regularly audit your project dependencies; version control is only as good as the stability of the packages you track.
content.next_steps: Once your version control is locked in, begin implementing CI/CD pipelines to automate your testing phase, ensuring your code remains production-ready at every commit.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the architecture to build fearlessly. Stop wrestling with lost files and start scaling your vision with the tools professionals trust. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
